# OPERATION AND MAINTENANCE MANUAL FOR SMP Series Hydraulic Pump

![images/e8f78318e7674980e4f62c0c6e460fc3b77514d6dcea1120bef65c80deb65760.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

# WREN Hydraulic Tool

It is operation manual of SMP serries including operation rules for AirPump professional assembling. please read carefully follow instructions $\cdot$ warnings and cautions before using the tools.

# Safety Guide

The safety operation for HydraulicAir Pump must be required correct operation and regular inspecting. Please make sure to read carefully and understand Safety Guide before operation.

$\triangle$ Notice: To avoid the damage of property.   
$\triangle$ Warning: To avoid person's injury.

Please follow aforesaid two points.

In operating, if something abnormal happens, please shut off the power immediately, and then consult WREN or WREN's agent.

1. When using, do not permit any person stand at the oil output in order to avoid personal injury and equipment damage. Please put the pump far away from the fire.   
2.Make sure that the hose and quick coupler be connected before building up the pressure in order to avoid hydraulic fluid spurting out to cause personal injury.   
3. The maximum operating pressure of this pump is 70Mpa(10,000Psi), WREN has set up the pressure to 70Mpa before selling this pump. Please do not adjust to a pressure higher than the maximum pressure which WREN has not set.   
4. If this pump is used for operating other equipments, make sure the maximum operating pressure of the equipments will be less than 70Mpa. Please adjust the pressure to which the equipment need, or else the equipment would be damaged.   
5.Make sure the power of the pump is shut off before repairing it.   
6.If the rapid release of pressure, lifting jack in the load will fall or spring open, may cause injuries; please refer to WREN or WREN authorized agents, they will recommend you the right valve.   
7. Please shut off the switch before starting power; if the switch is on, the pressure may increase.   
8.Make sure the equipment be connected with ground to avoid electric shock.   
9. Please do not change any part of the pump; if it must be changed, please inform WREN or Wren's agent for help. Without allowance of WREN or its agent, any refit of it will be out of our warranty range.   
10. Please do not fill the pump reservoir with too much oil, otherwise, the pressure of the reservoir will increase and the oil will spill over, so the reservoir will be broken and the environment will be polluted.   
11.Make sure the quick coupler is tightened; if the quick coupler is not tightened enough, the equipment will not work normally; if it is a synchronous system, the problem may cause one or several pieces of equipment out of order and the quick coupler may be broken and it may cause personal injury or equipment damage.   
12. Please stand away from the position where the hydraulic oil may be spurt out; hydraulic oil may penetrate your hand and hurt you.   
13.If the hydraulic oil splashed in your eyes, please immediately clean your eyes about 15 minutes with clean water, then you must go to hospital for help right now.

![images/27a485aa1a4f3a4be1a6d20e718c5f1c9dfe820e3d934f9fbf027056cb7525d8.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

![images/86386c2e83f41f2224ba8ee5df3b993eac7514625f5ac97c0cdbfb3897244ae5.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)  
FIG1

14. Please do not touch the pressurized hose; if the hydraulic oil splashed out, it will cause serious injury.   
15.Hydraulic hose is easily spoiled fitting; you inspect the hose with eyes regularly and find no problems, but the inner side may have crack and small hole; WREN suggests you should change the hose regularly for

# PRECAUTION

1. Please use special Hydraulic Oil for WREN tools   
2.Do not use pressure regulate valve as relief valve.   
3. The used hydraulic oil should be put away according to the antipollution ordinance.

# DESCRIPTION

1. SMP series Hydraulic Air Pump is assembled with standard module; Pump Subassembly, Control Valve, Oil Tank, Air Motors, cooler, Gauge consisting of an independent and complete hydraulic device, has the advantages of small volume, light weight, simple structure, convenient operation, high pressure. High Pressure and low Pressure both supply the oil to get the maximum output oil. When in High Pressure, oil is returned in Low pressure port by Relief Valve without any load, to reduce the losing of Power, and Oil output pressure for port A may adjust from 70 to 700Bar.

2.Hydraulic oil: #46 antiwear oil in Summer and #32 antiwear oil in Winter.   
3.Environment temperature: - 10~60 C   
4. Please use standard Hose, Quick Couplers, etc from WREN. The maximum pressure of Hose for Hydraulic Air Pump is 700Bar.   
5.If any other Hydraulic Products used, please consult WREN engineer.   
6. Please do not regulate Pressure Valve arbitrarily to avoid equipment damaged and Person's injury.

# DESCRIPTIONS OF PARTS

1.Oil Tank: Fill oil in Tank, to make sure the Hydraulic System work normally (It must have enough oil in Tank).   
2. Valve Assembly: Exchanged with kinds of Valve Assembly with different functions.   
3.Air Pump: Air Driven   
4.Frame for protecting: Protect the equipment and convenient to moving.   
5Air Control Valve: Control Air Motor working and Air operation system.

6. Oil Filling Port: Fill oil by this port. Filter inside design to stop the dust into Tank. On oil cap, we designed a hole for air in and out.   
7.Oil Gauge: Show oil lever in operation, to make sure there will be better oil capacity in Tank.   
8.Oil releasing Port: Sealed with 1/4BSP Screw Plug for oil leak.   
9. Quick Coupler: Small Check Valve designed in Quick Coupler, quick connecting system equipment.   
10.Hex Screw: Fix and connect Tank and Cover Plate.

# CHARACTERISTIC

1. SMP series Air Pump with two speeds. High pressure outlet is provided with a pressure relief valve, 5.5L/min --7.2L/min at pressure of 5 --7Bar, and 0.8L/min at pressure of 700Bar.   
2. Maximum Operating Pressure: 700Bar   
3. Maximum input pressure to Air Motor: 4--8Bar   
4. Temperature: - 10~80 C   
5. Oil Tank Capacity: from 4L to 65L   
6. Hydraulic Oil: ISO VG 46# in Summer and 32# in Winter

# WARNING!!!

1. When operating, do not permit anyone stand at the oil output, The oil output must connect other components when adjusting the pressure.   
2.When using, do not overpass the max operating pressure.   
3.If the inspecting for Air Motor needed, please shut off Air Power   
4. When working, the oil back to oil reservoir may add the pressure. If open the cover plate, unnecessary injury and damage may happen.   
5.Forfend the operation without oil   
6. Keep the pump clean, clean especially the oil inlet, quick couplers.   
7. Suggestion: in the condition of not using the pump always, please remember to replace the hydraulic oil.

# MAINTENANCE AND INSPECTION

1. The inspection before operating   
1.1 Please shut off Power and inspect whether the position of the power connection is loose or not. If it is loose, please tighten it.   
1.2 Please inspect whether the hydraulic oil in the oil reservoir is enough or not, if it is not enough, please fill the oil in time.   
1.3 The pump is still working when the Direction Valve is changed, please build up pressure and inspect whether the whole equipment is normal or not.   
1.4 Please inspect whether the hose and other equipments are leaky or not, if this happened, please inspect to find the reason and repair it or replace it.   
2. The inspection in operation When inspecting the following items, if there is abnormal situation, please shut off the pump and repair it.   
2.1 Please inspect whether there are abnormal conditions or not in the course of raising the pressure.   
2.2 Please inspect whether the hoses and other equipments are leaky or not.   
2.3 Please inspect whether there is some abnormal noise, rocking and smell or not during operation of air motor.   
2.4 Please inspect whether the temperature of hydraulic oil is too high or not.   
3. The inspection after finishing the operation of Pump.   
3.1 Make sure to shut off Power   
3.2 Please inspect whether there are leaky or abnormal condition or not. If there is abnormal situation, please inspect to find the reason and repair it.   
3.3 Please clean it after using the pump.

Replace Hydraulic Oil

4. The oil should be replaced once a year principally. If there are following abnormal conditions, please replace oil immediately.   
4.1 If dust mixes with oil, please replace oil.   
4.2 If there is abnormal smell, please replace oil.   
4.3 If the water mixes with oil, the colour of oil has been changed into milkiness, please replace oil.   
4.4 If the colour of oil has been changed into black-brown, please replace oil.

5. The way for replacing hydraulic oil

5.1 Please loosen Cap for Oil Filling Port   
5.2 Please take down Screw Plug for leak oil fully   
5.3 Please clean Tank inside and Filter, tighten Screw Plug and fill oil again.

WARNING: If oil splashes into your eyes, please wash with clean water for at least 15 minutes, and then see doctor immediately. If oil splashes to your skin, please wash it with clean water and soap.

WARNING: Waste hydraulic oil bellows to industrial waste, it should be dealt with by special companies.

# Noise/Vibration And Transport information

1、Hydraulic pump noise declaration

1) Hydraulic pump noise value: $\leq 70\mathrm{db}$

2、Hydraulic pump transport information.

1) Handle with care.   
2)The shipment should be vertical upward, as shown in the figure 9-1.

# OPERATION INSTRUCTIONS

Valve Assembly Type A (Double Acting by hand operation):

# 1. READY

Before starting Air Power, please clean and inspection of the connector, then injected into a special hydraulic oil, in ensure the use of pressure in the pressure range, connected Air Pump by a hose and tool, check whether the correct connection of safety, such as incorrect, Pump will not be worked normally. Check Manual Direction Control Valve and adjust it according to operation.

# 2. START TO OPERATE

Turn on the Air Power, start Air Motor by pushing "ON" on Handle controller, adjust direction valve at position of "Advance", when pressure increased at needed value, and adjust direction valve at middle position, namely pressure hold.

# 3. DISASSEMBLY

After finished operation, please push button "OFF" on handle controller, and shut off power, adjust direction valve at releasing position, and disassemble Hose.

![images/7d4f7a34fb393d6276f2b32f8c872550da8936c52fa9e43311ec493c05869588.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

# 1. READY

Before starting Air Power, please clean and inspection of the connector, then injected into a special hydraulic oil, in ensure the use of pressure in the pressure range, connected Air Pump by a hose and tool, check whether the correct connection of safety, such as incorrect, Pump will not be worked normally. Inspect if check valve on Valve Block is locked tightly, adjust it according to operation(Tighten for pressure hold and loosen for pressure releasing).

# 2. START TO OPERATE

Turn on the Air Power, tighten check valve on valve block, start Air Motor by pushing "ON" on Handle controller, when pressure increased at needed value, leave away from handle controller and pressure hold namely.

# 3. DISASSEMBLY

After finished operation, please push button "OFF" on handle controller, and shut off power, loosen check valve to release pressure, and take down the hose.

![images/1bf8480355213c27d5548af1f78713d138f504c2cc2a7f5a1f458272f4e72c83.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Valve Assembly Type C (Single Acting by remote control with pressure hold):

# 1. READY

Before starting Air Power, please clean and inspection of the connector, then injected into a special hydraulic oil, in ensure the use of pressure in the pressure range, connected Air Pump by a hose and tool, check whether the correct connection of safety, such as incorrect, Pump will not be worked normally. There are two buttons on remote control( "ON" for pressure increasing and "OFF" for pressure reducing).

# 2. START TO OPERATE

Turn on the Air Power, Please push to hold button "ON" to increase pressure at needed value, stop and pressure hold namely, and push to hold button " OFF" to reduce pressure.

# 3. DISASSEMBLY

After finished operation, shut off Air Power, push button on air valve to release pressure, and take down the hose.

A B

Valve Assembly Type D (Single Acting by remote control without pressure hold):

# 1. READY

Before starting Air Power, please clean and inspection of the connector, then injected into a special hydraulic oil, in ensure the use of pressure in the pressure range, connected Air Pump by a hose and tool, check whether the correct connection of safety, such as incorrect, Pump will not be worked normally. There are two buttons on remote control (Button" ON" increasing pressure and the same function with another button)

# 2. START TO OPERATE

Turn on the Air Power, Please push to hold button "ON" to increase pressure at needed value, loosen for releasing pressure (Another button with the same function).

# 3. DISASSEMBLY

After finished operation, shut off Air Power, after pressure releasing in system, and take down the hose.

A B

Valve Assembly Type D (Double Acting by remote control with pressure hold):

# 1. READY

Before starting Air Power, please clean and inspection of the connector, then injected into a special hydraulic oil, in ensure the use of pressure in the pressure range, connected Air Pump by a hose and tool, check whether the correct connection of safety, such as incorrect, Pump will not be worked normally. There are two buttons on remote control (Button "ON" for Port B inputs oil and Port A outputs oil, Button "OFF" for Port B outputs oil and Port A inputs oil)

# 2. START TO OPERATE

Turn on the air Power, Air Motor works, Pistons supplies oil, Port A returns oil; Loose button "ON", Air Motor stops, Pistons stops to supply the oil, Port B will not hold pressure. Opposite operation on Button "OFF".

# 3. DISASSEMBLY

After finished operation, shut off Air Power, push button on air valve to release pressure, and take down the hose.

A B

# WARNING FOR USING HIGH PRESSURE HOSE

1. Please use Wren's JH series high pressure hoses.   
2. The minimum bending radius: $R > 120$ mm. Too small bending radius will destroy the high pressure hoses.   
3. The maximum operating pressure is 70 Mpa, and it is forbidden to overpass the pressure.   
4. Do not tighten hoses excessively. Over tightening can cause to premature thread failure or high pressure fittings to split at a pressure lower than their rated capacities.   
5. Should any hydraulic hose rupture, burst, or need to be disconnected, immediately shut off the pump. Never attempt to grasp a leaking pressurized hose with your hands. The force of escaping hydraulic fluid could cause serious injury.   
6. Do not use the hose to remove attached equipment. Stress can damage the hose, causing personal injury.   
7. Do not subject the hose to potential hazard such as fire, sharp surfaces, extreme heat or cold or heavy impact. Do not kink, twist, or bend the hose so tightly that oil flowing in the hose is blocked or reduced. Periodically inspect the hose for wearing, because any of these conditions can damage the hose.   
8.WREN JH series 100Mpa high pressure hose's operating pressure is 100Mpa.,. Overpass this pressure is forbidden.

# AFTER-SALES SERVICE

1.WREN guarantees quality of the material used for manufacturing products and quality of your technical fulfillment. The guarantee period of the products is 12 months from the date of selling.   
2.If any quality issue due to the defects of the materials or craftsmanship is found within the guarantee period. WREN will be responsible and repair or replace the defective products for free.   
3.If the equipment is damaged because of happenstance, wrong operating and modifying or repairing the parts without consulting WREN's technical service department, WREN will not guarantee these cases.

# WREN

# SMP系列专业组装气动泵操作和维护手册

# 雷恩液压

本操作手册内容包括SMP系列专业组装气动泵的操作规程、警告和注意事项以及故障排除。使用前，请仔细阅读本手册，彻底理解其内容并妥善保管。

# 安全指示

液压气动泵的安全使用，必须要求正确操作和定期检查。

在阅读和彻底理解本手册中的安全指示条例后才可以使用本气动泵。

注意事项--防止造成直接经济损失或财物损失。  
警告事项--防止造成人身伤害。

请确实遵守上述两个事项。

在使用过程中，如发生异常情况，请关闭气源，拔出气源接头，然后向WREN或WREN授权代理商咨询。

1. 使用本气动泵时，所有人员禁止站在液压油出口处，防止液压油不小心泄漏时可能发生的人身伤害或财产损失。  
2. 加压前，应加装软管或快速接头，防止高压液压油冲出造成人身伤害。  
3. 本液压气动泵的最高工作压力为70Mpa，在出厂时工厂已设定压力为70Mpa。绝不要将压力调节到超过设定压力。  
4. 如本气动泵用于操作其它配套设备，配套设备的耐压应不小于70Mpa，并将压力调定为其配套设备的工作压力，否则配套设备有可能损坏；调整压力调节阀的操作参见第六、七项。  
5. 充分考虑安全性，在维修前，应将设备的气源切断。  
6. 如果迅速释放压力，顶升中的千斤顶上的负载会跌落或弹开，可能造成人身伤害；请向WREN或WREN授权代理商咨询，他们会向你推荐合适的阀。  
7. 在插上气源前，关掉按钮开关；如果开关处于闭合状态，压力会增加。  
8. 不要改装本气动泵；如确实需要改装，应先向WREN 或WREN授权代理商咨询。没有WREN的书面同意，所作改装，不在质保范围内。  
9. 不要加注超过可用油量的液压油，否则，贮油箱中的压力会增加或溢出，贮油箱有可能损坏、会造成对环境的污染。  
10. 连接快速接头时拧紧，接头与接头之间不要有间隙，否则设备将不能正常工作；如果在同步系统中，会造成其中一台或多台设备不能正常工作。如果出现这种情况，快速接头、设备可能损坏，可能会造成人身伤害。  
11. 远离超高压液压油可能喷出的位置；液压油可能伤及人身安全，导致严重受伤。  
12. 如果液压油喷到你的眼睛里，立即用清水冲洗大约15分钟，然后去医院配合医生治疗。  
13. 不要碰带压力的软管；如果液压油喷出，会导致严重伤害。

![images/48c23c75a8155a4e80e509f99f1c15c042416766efc0eeae558b9f792aaab430.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)  
图1

# 注意事项

1. 请使用WREN液压工具专用油。  
2. 不要将压力调节阀当作一般的调整阀或释放阀使用。  
3. 要按照防污调理处理使用过后的废旧液压油

# 注意事项

1 SMP系列气动泵采用集成方式组装；由油泵、控制阀、油箱、气动马达、冷却器、仪表等组成的一种独立完整的液压装置，具有体积小、重量轻、结构简单、操作方便、工作压力高等特点。泵为高、低压油泵同时供油，可获得较大的输出油量。高压时，低压泵经卸荷溢流阀自动空载回油，可减少功率消耗，并且（A）口出油压力可 $70\sim 700\mathrm{Bar}$ 任意调节。  
2 液压气动泵使用的液压油：46#抗磨液压油（夏季）32#抗磨液压油（冬季）。  
3 液压气动泵使用的环境温度： $-10^{\circ}60^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$   
4 请使用WREN高压软管、高压接头等。WREN液压气动泵配用的高压软管最大工作压力为70Mpa，使用时请选用与之配套的压力系统。  
5 此泵如需使用附属液压产品，请咨询WREN公司工程师。  
6 请不要任意调节压力调节阀，以避免超高压引起的设备损坏和人身伤害。

# SMP 系列气动泵

零部件概述  

<table><tr><td>序号</td><td>名称</td><td>序号</td><td>名称</td></tr><tr><td>1</td><td>保护架</td><td>6</td><td>油水分离器</td></tr><tr><td>2</td><td>油位计</td><td>7</td><td>气动马达</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>储油箱</td><td>8</td><td>插装阀块(A/B/C/D/H)</td></tr><tr><td>4</td><td>排油孔</td><td>9</td><td>快速接头</td></tr><tr><td>5</td><td>油箱盖</td><td>10</td><td>六角螺钉</td></tr></table>

外观尺寸概述  

<table><tr><td>序列号</td><td>SMP04</td><td>SMP08</td><td>SMP13</td><td>SMP18</td><td>SMP24</td><td>SMP32</td><td>SMP56</td></tr><tr><td>A</td><td>254mm</td><td>254mm</td><td>314mm</td><td>314mm</td><td>314mm</td><td>460mm</td><td>522mm</td></tr><tr><td>B</td><td>430mm</td><td>480mm</td><td>480mm</td><td>510mm</td><td>570mm</td><td>510mm</td><td>600mm</td></tr><tr><td>C</td><td>200mm</td><td>200mm</td><td>260mm</td><td>260mm</td><td>260mm</td><td>460mm</td><td>505mm</td></tr><tr><td>D</td><td>240mm</td><td>240mm</td><td>300mm</td><td>300mm</td><td>300mm</td><td>505mm</td><td>522mm</td></tr><tr><td>E</td><td>377mm</td><td>379mm</td><td>463mm</td><td>463mm</td><td>463mm</td><td>662mm</td><td>662mm</td></tr><tr><td>F</td><td>244mm</td><td>244mm</td><td>320mm</td><td>320mm</td><td>320mm</td><td>600mm</td><td>600mm</td></tr><tr><td>G</td><td>290mm</td><td>299mm</td><td>400mm</td><td>400mm</td><td>400mm</td><td>645mm</td><td>645mm</td></tr></table>

# 零部件概述

1. 贮油箱：存放工作用液压油，保证系统正常工作（必须有足够油量），提供系统所需的压力载体。  
2插装式阀块：可更换插装式阀块（A/B/C/D/H)实现不同的操控性。  
3 气动马达：通过气源作为动力源。  
4 油泵保护架：安装在油箱上，用于提携、保护气动泵站。  
5 气控阀：气路控制系统，操控气动马达运转。

6 通气注油孔：液压油由此注入贮油箱（添加液压油时使用）；注油时拧开油盖，内有过滤网防止杂质进入油箱；油盖设计有通气功能，拧紧后确保系统中的空气流通。  
7 油位视窗：观察油箱内的油量，以保证提供最佳使用油量；液压油低于油标视窗位置时，必须加注WREN泵站专用液压油，否则可能会损坏泵站。  
8 卸油孔：螺塞G1/4", 实现液压油排出储油箱(更换液压油时使用)。  
9 快速接头：实现液压油输出\回油功能，快速连接油管；内置式单向阀。

10 六角螺钉：密封连接油箱。

# 特性

1 SMP系列气动泵是双级泵。高压出口设有高压溢流阀，低压出口设定压力为5~7Mpaa流量为  
5.5~7.2L/min，在70Mpa状态下流量为0.8L/m。  
2 最大操作压力：70Mpa。  
3 气动马达：工作气压4~8bar。  
4 使用温度： $-10\sim 60^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$ 。  
5 储油箱规格（油箱型号）：4~65L共7种规格。  
6 液压油：ISO VG 46#（夏季）或32#（冬季）。

# 警告！！！

1 泵站在使用过程中，高压输出油管处禁止站人，调压时输出油口必须连接其他元件。  
2 泵站使用时，禁止随意调高超出本泵的最大工作压力，否则会造成泵站的损坏。  
3 需要检查气动马达时，必须切断气源输入。  
4 泵站工作时，返回贮油箱的油可能会增压，如果此时打开贮油箱盖可能会造成不必要的损伤和伤害。  
5 禁止无油启动泵站，这将会造成泵站损坏。  
6 必须保持液压泵站的清洁，特别是注油口、快速接头等处，是引发泵站的故障的主要原因之一。  
7 建议：液压油每6个月至少更换一次（不经常使用的情况下）。

# 警告标志

# 警告标志如下表所示

<table><tr><td>擦加化学品</td><td>额×</td><td>浆塗地層</td></tr><tr><td colspan="3">PENATURE INFORMATION, please see below
DESCRIPTION OF THIS ITEM BY HANDS OR BY ELECTRIC CONTROL</td></tr><tr><td>请阅读安全条例</td><td colspan="2">油箱侧面</td></tr><tr><td>WARNING
•To help avoid personal injury,read the operating instructions before using this pump.
•Disconnect the power supply before any maintenance is performed on this pump. All electrical work must be done by a qualified electrical.
•Operators of this hydraulic power supply unit or operations of equipment powered by this unit must be knowledgeable of hydraulic equipment hazards if any hydraulic equipment is used incorrectly.
•Hydraulic fluid recommended in operating instructions must be used in this pump.
•Do not use pump in any type of explosive, flammable,or gas environment.
•Escaping hydraulic fluid under pressure can have sufficient force to penetrate the skin and cause serious personal injury.If you are injured by escaping hydraulic fluid,seek medical attention immediately.See operating instructions for further precautions to help prevent the possibility of hazards occurring due to escaping hydraulic fluid.</td><td>警告</td><td>油箱正面</td></tr></table>

# 保养检查

# 1. 使用前检查事项

1.1 检查气源连接部位是否有松脱、连接不良等情况，如发现气源连接部位有松脱现象，应及时将松脱的部位拧紧。  
1.2 检查液压油的油量是否达到规定的值，不足时请及时添加，但不要超过可用油量。  
1.3 在方向控制阀切换时，请注意查看加压有无异常。  
1.4 检查配管和设备是否有漏油现象，如有此类现象发生，请查明原因并对此进行处理。

# 2. 操作中的检查事项

如下列情况中有任一项发生，请立即停止工作，处理相应故障

2.1 在升压过程中出现有异常情况。  
2.2 配管及设备出现漏油现象。  
2.3 气动马达在工作中有异常噪声、震动及异味。  
2.4 液压油温度过高。

# 3. 操作后的注意事项

3.1 必须切断气源。  
3.2 检查是否有漏油或者其他异常情况。如果有异常情况发生，请查明原因并进行处理。  
3.3 使用后请进行清理。

# 4. 关于液压油的更换

液压油应每6个月更换一次。如果出现下列情况，请立即更换。

4.1 灰尘进入时。  
4.2 有异味时。  
4.3 液压油涉入过量的水分，液压油呈现出乳白色时。  
4.4 油劣化呈现黑褐色时。

# 5. 液压油的更换方法。

5.1 松开气动泵上的通气注油盖。  
5.2拧下油箱侧面的螺钉，让油箱内的剩余液压油排尽。  
5.3 清洁油箱内部及吸入口的过滤网，拧紧排油口的螺钉，将油加入油箱。

警告：如果油液溅到您的眼睛里，应立即用清水冲洗至少15分钟，冲洗完毕后应立即去医院配合医生治疗。如果油液飞溅到您的皮肤上，请用清水和肥皂清洗。

警告：废弃的液压油属于工业废料，应委托具有收集和处理工业废料的公司处理。

# 噪音及运输

# 1，SMP系列气动泵噪音/振动声明

SMP系列气动泵使用噪音值：≤70db

# 2、SMP系列气动泵运输信息

2.1、搬运时注意轻拿轻放。  
2.2、装运时应将产品立式向上，如下图所示

![images/0004bf8ac4bbeb8a68445625123fdf172324a7e53a4f7688700db83ccce29ad5.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

2.3、产品搬运一般采用手提式或小车搬运移动、吊装移动，如下图所示

![images/ec268f5531127d0e52f6813e31475deccc954f334db0b9ed4f48ddb111abbefa.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

# 操作方法（压力调整）

# A型阀块泵（手控双作用）：

# 1.准备

启动马达前先清洁和检查各连接器接头，然后注入专用液压油，在确保使用压力在压力表量程内，用软管连接气动泵和操作工具，检查连接处是否安全正确，如不正确，液压泵无法正常工作。检查手动换向阀开关所示方向，根据工作需要调节手动换向阀。

# 2.启动

打开气源，按一下手柄控制按钮ON键启动马达，调节手动换向阀到前进（后退）位置，按住ON键不放，压力升高到所需压力值，手动换向阀回中位即保压。

# 3.拆卸

工作完毕后，按动手柄控制按钮OFF键关闭马达，切断气源，扳动手动换向阀泄压，拆卸软管。

![images/109ea180401890114ed56f413ef9274a5a0d8dfc137a6e221d463ceb1d1bc96f.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

# B型阀块泵（手控单作用）：

# 1. 准备

启动马达前先清洁和检查各连接器接头，然后注入专用液压油，在确保使用压力在压力表量程内，用软管连接气动泵和操作工具，检查连接处是否安全正确，如不正确，液压泵无法正常工作。检查手动阀是否锁紧，根据工作需要调节手动阀（拧紧保压、旋松泄压）。

# 2.启动

打开气源，按一下手柄控制按钮ON键启动马达，旋紧手动阀，按住ON键不放，压力升高到所需压力值并保压。

# 3.拆卸

工作完毕后，按动手柄控制按钮OFF键关闭马达，切断气源，旋松手动阀泄压，拆卸软管。

![images/a5304c77927f816f11ad82868d7960abbeef54efaae3ff764532b566134bcda9.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

# C型阀块泵（电控单作用保压）：

# 1. 准备

启动马达前先清洁和检查各连接器接头，然后注入专用液压油，在确保使用压力在压力表量程内，用软管连接气动泵和操作工具，检查连接处是否安全正确，如不正确，液压泵无法正常工作。线控开关有两个按钮（ON键按住升压，OFF键按住泄压）。

# 2.启动

打开气源，按住手柄按钮ON键启动马达，ON键按住升压，压力升高到所需压力值并保压，OFF键按住泄压，压力下降。

# 3.拆卸

工作完毕后，松开手柄按钮ON关闭马达，切断气源，按动气动控制阀顶端按钮泄压，拆卸软管。

![images/3059199f80c58056b6c75cb57ecd178ca74867e640cd8f82290c706d1e6f8f1e.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

D型阀块泵（电控单作用不保压）：

# 1 .准备

启动马达前先清洁和检查各连接器接头，然后注入专用液压油，在确保使用压力在压力表量程内，用软管连接气动泵和操作工具，检查连接处是否安全正确，如不正确，液压泵无法正常工作。线控开关有两个按钮（ON键按住升压，B键备用）。

# 2.启动

打开气源，按一下手柄控制按钮ON键启动马达，ON键按住不放升压，压力升高到所需压力值，松开按钮便泄压，B键备用。

# 3.拆卸

工作完毕后，松开手柄控制按钮ON键关闭马达，切断气源，系统泄压后，拆卸软管。

![images/2076e2f228a21693acafc373b0472b5e35beb6ac1f5a37f70baace8f7def0659.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

型阀块泵（电控双作用）：

# 1.准备

启动马达前先清洁和检查各连接器接头，然后注入专用液压油，在确保使用压力在压力表量程内，用软管连接气动泵和操作工具，检查连接处是否安全正确，如不正确，液压泵无法正常工作。线控开关有两个按钮（ON键按住B口进油A口回油，OFF键反之）。

# 2.启动

打开气源，ON键按住，气动马达工作，柱塞供油，B口上压，A口回油；ON键松开，气动马达停止工作，柱塞停止供油，B口不保压。OFF键反之。

# 3.拆卸

工作完毕后，松开手柄控制按钮ON键关闭马达，切断气源，按动气动控制阀顶端按钮泄压，拆卸软软管。

![images/af5711c92008ecb9ae71a1f6bc6932a8d6baa87295372627be39f7bccf193315.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

SMP系列气动液压泵的故障排除   

<table><tr><td rowspan="2">无法启动泵站</td><td>气源气压不符</td><td>确定气源气压是否符合泵站规定要求</td></tr><tr><td>气源未接通</td><td>检查气源、气源连接部、插座等,接通气源</td></tr><tr><td rowspan="4">系统无压力</td><td>快速接头未接到位</td><td>拆开,重新安装</td></tr><tr><td>贮油箱内无油</td><td>加注油</td></tr><tr><td>贮油箱内油量不足</td><td>加注油</td></tr><tr><td>系统带有节流阀、手动单向阀的,检查阀是否打开</td><td>打开节流阀、手动单向阀,确定系统为通路状态</td></tr><tr><td>重装快速接头,系统无压力</td><td>快速接头无法接到位,引起系统内敞压</td><td>拆开快速接头,用顶杆检查快速接头钢球是否有弹性,如顶不动,用小锤敲击钢球,使雾状液压油排尽</td></tr><tr><td>快速接头处漏油</td><td>快速接头编?型圈、挡圈磨损</td><td>更换快速接头或“0”型圈</td></tr><tr><td rowspan="8">系统压力达不到额定压力</td><td>溢流阀调整得过低</td><td>压力表检测,溢流阀调至系统额值</td></tr><tr><td>水油混合</td><td>换油</td></tr><tr><td>贮油箱内油量不足</td><td>加注油</td></tr><tr><td>吸入空气</td><td>系统反复空运转数次,排尽空气</td></tr><tr><td>节流阀、手动单向阀未关紧</td><td>锁紧阀</td></tr><tr><td>节流阀、手动单向阀未调整到位</td><td>调整至正确位置</td></tr><tr><td>节流阀、手动单向阀损坏</td><td>更换阀</td></tr><tr><td>液压油中含有杂质</td><td>清洗泵站阀块并更换清洁液压油</td></tr><tr><td>静压使用时,压力缓慢下降</td><td>密封失灵,检查各密封处</td><td>更换密封件</td></tr><tr><td>泵在运行过程中有强烈噪音</td><td>径向柱塞泵轴承损坏</td><td>更换轴承</td></tr></table>

![images/2f8b183ee479a357cf6b871b0bc0b9d692a9b2e8e316c99c095689694ea42647.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

# 系列气动泵控制原理图

![images/e16f0bc2d405e4bcc89816a39a0f6edcd252c60f963197d588eea0f51da76f56.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)  
A 型阀块电动泵

![images/f4c2ef22a70227aafc0e543795bba490fbaa42ef0025df6d5df4a333ed62cc12.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

![images/2379d859476e6d4e99bbd3daf2e149fa785ec4c18a70326eebeb04a810714f7a.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

![images/63d2e1d825be4edfd139075734f63c83e545b9d39ab4e8bcfbc7d897353adc9d.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)  
H型阀块电动泵

![images/8a176aa2be0a7b810b5379c8fd800574f8186736b4145741b5e905e601d33912.jpg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)  
A型控制阀块泵

# 高压软管使用警告

1. 适用WREN JH系列等级的高压软管。  
2. 最小弯曲半径：R>120mm。过小的弯曲半径，将严重损坏高压软管。  
3. 操作压力为70Mpa，禁止超压使用。  
4. 操作中不得使软管缠绕，否则会使油管生产过大的背压，使软管内部损坏，软管过早报。  
5.不得将重物掉到或压到软管上；严重冲击可能引起软管损坏，使用时将会暴裂，并引起人身伤害。  
6.不得用软管拖、拉、吊起重物。  
7.禁止在过热、火焰、机器辗轧、利刃和化学腐蚀等条件环境下使用。软管布置在通道上时，必须加装盖板。  
8 .WREN JH系列100Mpa等级高压软管操作压力为100Mpa，禁止超高压使用，

# 售后服务

1. 自客户购买WREN品牌液压机具产品之日起，WREN公司为用户提供十二个月的保质期。  
2.WREN产品在保质期，内因材料、制造缺陷引起的质量问题，由WREN公司免费便换、维修。  
3. 因工作状况不符合规定、意外事故、滥用、操作不当、未经受权的产品改装或修理以及不按规范操作而引起的产品损坏，不属本保修范围。
